project_area: Biomedical research with a focus on student and faculty engagement
demographic_requirements: Faculty principal investigators at NH-INBRE Partner institutions
eligibility_summary: Open to faculty at NH-INBRE Partner institutions proposing competitive biomedical research projects. Includes Research Projects (50% effort), Pilot Projects (25% effort), and Collaborative Projects (with Dartmouth or UNH collaborators). Alternative funding mechanisms include Seed Grants (1-year, no salary support) and Targeted Incentive Grants (for manuscripts or grant applications).
